title: api-verify: preflight in credential step + install creds
intent: Fix #53 preflight false failure: run ls-remote with credentials in same step; re-apply creds before pip install.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Merge preflight into configure step; map SG_SPEC_TOKEN in Install API deps step.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: #53 merged separate preflight step; main red at preflight (26535660007) until credential context is correct per step.

files.intent: Preflight + install both use credential store with SG_SPEC_TOKEN env.
verification: CI: Configure/preflight + Install API deps green
